patient_summary: Olivia, a 73-year-old (DOB 05/05/1952) female, has documented dyslipidemia (Mixed dyslipidemia - Primary; Hyperlipidemia associated with type 2 diabetes mellitus), essential hypertension, postoperative and unspecified anemia, and leg pain. Recent labs from 07/03/2023 include elevated ferritin 266.8 (H) ng/mL, low iron 41 (L) ug/dL with iron saturation 15 (L)%, eGFR CKD-EPI 58 (L) ml/min/1.73m2, TSH 1.320 mIU/mL, and lipid abnormalities including Triglycerides 158 (H) mg/dL and VLDL 32 (H) mg/dL. A colonoscopy with biopsy is scheduled/performed 02/21/2025. Multiple care teams are documented including Hand HA MD (PCP), Hershey CL MD (PCP), cardiology, endocrinology, and pulmonary providers. Notable items: PHQ-9/PHQ-2 scores of 0 on 03/28/2023, prior MRSA and COVID-19 entries, and documented functional limitations (difficulty walking). Conflicting demographic and smoking history entries are present across source documents.
